channel.title: Posts on Jinsong Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Jinsong Zhang

item.title: COVID-19 situation in the US (3/1/2020-6/12/2020)
item.description: import os import pandas as pd import numpy as np import matplotlib.pyplot as plt We download the most updated Cases in the US from the “COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE)” at Johns Hopkins University. These include (i) confirmed cases and (ii) deaths, since 1/23/20 till the preceding day of the current date. ! git pull origin master ! git remote -v From https://github.
